mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, nickname, avatar) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar})
mapper.select: select id, username, password, nickname, avatar, status, created_at, updated_at from sys_user where status = 1 order by created_at desc
select id, username, password, nickname, avatar, status, created_at, updated_at from sys_user where username = #{username} limit 1
select id from sys_role where role_code = #{roleCode} and status = 1 limit 1
select distinct r.role_code from sys_user_role ur inner join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.status = 1 order by r.id

select distinct p.permission_code from sys_user_role ur inner join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id inner join sys_role_permission rp on rp.role_id = r.id inner join sys_permission p on p.id = rp.permission_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.status = 1 and p.status = 1 order by p.id
